disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: Apache-2.0. Prometheus projects require DCO sign-off (Signed-off-by) on commits. Follow CONTRIBUTING for PR conventions; jest unit tests are the check gate.

limitations: Contributor self-run record of Northset's own contribution; not the maintainer's verification.

The declared network-off check runs the prom-client jest unit suite on node:22 after a disclosed online phase-A npm ci. It does not run lint, prettier, or the TypeScript type-check gates that upstream CI also runs.
